results.title: "Spain was very generous today": Trump hails dramatic turnaround in ties following NATO defence spending row
results.description: Mildenhall [UK], July 9 (ANI): In a significant diplomatic shift following days of intense friction at the NATO summit, US President Donald Trump on Thursday praised Spain for making a major financial commitment, signalling an end to a standoff that had threatened to fracture bilateral trade and security relations.
